reforms.description: The Novas Oportunidades initiative aims to upgrade the competences and skills of the Portuguese population by providing learning opportunities to adults with low educational attainment and addressing poor performance in the education system, particularly for at-risk youth.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing the skills of the workforce, the initiative supports productivity and innovation in the economy.
reforms.status_evidence: The programme has been actively providing learning opportunities since its launch.
reforms.importance_rationale: The initiative represents a significant structural change in the approach to adult education and skills development.
reforms.source_quote: The government’s strategy to upgrade competences and provide the skills that are needed in the labour market is centred around the NovasOportunidades initiative.

reforms.description: The government has introduced reforms to human resource management in the public administration, including changes to recruitment, contracts, and remuneration systems, aimed at improving efficiency and effectiveness.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improving human resource management enhances the efficiency of public services, which can indirectly support innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The reforms have been put into practice and are currently in effect.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reforms represent a major overhaul of public administration practices.
reforms.source_quote: Changes to human resource management also include adopting a new system for careers, contracts and pay that will replace the current temporary measure of freezing automatic promotion and wage top-ups.

reforms.description: The Portuguese government launched the programme budgeting project in 2006 to establish a renewed budgetary framework aimed at improving the efficiency and effectiveness of public spending through evaluation of outcomes and a multiyear budgetary framework.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By improving public spending efficiency, the reform can enhance the allocation of resources towards innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The project has been actively implemented since its launch.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of a new budgetary framework represents a significant change in public financial management.
reforms.source_quote: The government launched the programme budgeting project in 2006, as part of the fiscal consolidation process, with the objective of establishing a renewed budgetary framework...

reforms.description: The government launched the Financial Innovation Framework for SMEs (INOFIN) to enhance access to capital for small and innovative firms through risk capital and guarantee funds, promoting public-private partnerships.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By improving access to capital, the framework supports the growth and innovation potential of SMEs.
reforms.status_evidence: The framework has been actively supporting SMEs since its launch.
reforms.importance_rationale: The framework represents a significant initiative to support the startup ecosystem.
reforms.source_quote: Since 2006, the Financial Innovation Framework for SMEs in Portugal (INOFIN) has supported SME access to capital, including equity, through the use of financial instruments.

reforms.description: The Simplex programme introduced various measures to simplify administrative procedures for businesses, including the elimination of unnecessary public deeds and the introduction of online company registration.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Simplifying administrative procedures can reduce barriers to business operations, fostering innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The measures have been actively implemented and are currently in effect.
reforms.importance_rationale: The programme represents a significant reform in how businesses interact with government.
reforms.source_quote: The Simplex programme introduced measures to improve the administrative and regulatory environment for business.
